LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS PAM MONIZ AND DMA CLAIMS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT - TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 501, THE REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING COURT, TO BE HEARD ON MARCH 4, 2014 AT 9:30 AM. (SEE SF LOCAL RULE 8.10.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, AFTER HEARING ARGUMENTS FROM BOTH PARTIES, THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS PAM MONIZ AND DMA CLAIMS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE FACTS SUPPORTING ALLEGATIONS OF CONSPIRACY/AGENCY/AIDING AND ABETTING, OR TO ALLEGE FACTS SUPPORTING EACH ELEMENT OF EACH CAUSE OF ACTION AS TO THE MOVING DEFENDANTS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK B. PAREDES, NOT REPORTED. (501)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JANUARY 21, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-04-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Scott A. Slomiak, Esq. attorney at law (415-924-8870) for Pam Moniz and DMA claims, Defendants and moving parties.
Joseph P. Brent, Esq. Brent, Fiol & Nolan LLP (415-984-0415) for Plaintiff & opposing party.

After hearing arguments from both parties, The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs PAM MONIZ and DMA CLAIMS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend to allege facts supporting allegations of conspiracy/agency/aiding and abetting, or to allege facts supporting each element of each cause of action as to the moving defendants. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk B. Paredes, Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Continued To Feb-04-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS PAM MONIZ & DMA CLAIMS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS Continued to February 4, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than January 21, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition and reply papers. JUdge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
